task.title: Configuring 802.3 link settings using the nmcli utility

context.p: To configure the 802.3 link settings of an Ethernet connection, modify the following configuration parameters:

step.cmd: Display the current settings of the connection:

info.p: You can use these values if you need to reset the parameters in case of any problems.

step.cmd: Set the speed and duplex link settings:

info.codeblock: # nmcli connection modify Example-connection 802-3-ethernet.auto-negotiate yes 802-3-ethernet.speed 10000 802-3-ethernet.duplex full
info.p: This command enables auto-negotiation and sets the speed of the connection to 10000 Mbit full duplex.

li.p: Use the ethtool utility to verify the values of Ethernet interface enp1s0:
li.codeblock:
# ethtool enp1s0
Settings for enp1s0: ... Speed: 10000 Mb/s Duplex: Full Auto-negotiation: on ... Link detected: yes
